programme.title: S1E3 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, and Nicholi Rogatkin, freestyle powerhouse, tackle the Downhill Challenge Medellín, the longest urban downhill race, with #HyperSmooth. Then join Gee, Rachel, and Dan Atherton, enduro and downhill champions, as they ride together through heart-pounding terrain. Speed, skill, and adrenaline collide in every unforgettable moment.

programme.title: S2E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike brings you the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch Sam Reynolds, street shredder, Clemens Kaudela, slopestyle champion, Theo Erlangsen, trail innovator, and Vincent Tupin, downhill powerhouse, in an exhilarating GoPro Course Preview in South Africa. Then head to Zion, Utah for Red Bull Rampage with Jaxson Riddle, big-air phenom, Reed Boggs, freeride master, Thomas Genon, slopestyle superstar, and Tom Van Steenbergen, trail blazing pro, as they push the limits of skill and courage on some of the planet’s most extreme terrain.

programme.title: S2E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on epic rides around the world. Watch Olympic gold medalist Conor Fields, BMX champion, compete at the highest level, then join GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, Geoff Gulevich, trail expert, and Sam Reynolds, street shredder, as they explore the stunning landscapes and dramatic terrain of Cappadocia, Turkey. Adventure, speed, and skill collide in every breathtaking moment.

programme.title: S1E1 Moto
programme.desc: Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa on the adventure of a lifetime as they explore the vibrant cities and stunning beaches of Morocco. Plus, enjoy exclusive bonus footage featuring the very best of GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S1E2 Moto
programme.desc: The journey continues as we follow two brothers on their 2,300-kilometer adventure across Morocco. Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa as they experience vibrant cities, breathtaking beaches, and the adventure of a lifetime. Plus, enjoy bonus footage of Jeremy Seewer. With 50 podiums, 11 victories, 17 race wins, and five FIM Motocross World Championship silver medals, his record is remarkable — yet his story goes far beyond the numbers.

programme.title: Fast Zombies with Guns
programme.desc: Collateral Damage. Sometimes, it’s unavoidable. Mobster Kingpin Paul Varlo’s (Charles Ramsey) attempt to kill a potential rat by poisoning his personal water supply leads to something he never saw coming – an outbreak of zombie carnage! To make matters worse, these zombies are different; they’re faster, meaner and they’re armed…With the town being overrun by fast zombies with guns, one resilient band of people are left to attempt an escape to the nearest undead-free zone and survival.Meanwhile, Jake (Tony Swansey) and his girlfriend Laura (Leena Kurishingal) are cruising their way up to this sweet, little Midwestern town. One quick business transaction with the local mob boss, and they can continue on their way to some fun in the sun, as planned. However, what they discover is a deserted town … at first.Will the group survive the terror that has befallen them? Will Jake and Laura get their money?? Will the zombies run out of bullets??? The answers can be found in … Fast Zombies with Guns.

programme.title: Seed of Darkness
programme.desc: A terrifying tale of the life of a single woman, who decides to undergo the “in-vitro fertilization process” in Singapore to have a child of her own. Seven years later, she moves into a new apartment and her child begins to behave oddly, much to the bafflement of the young mother. Her fears begin to mount when she finds her daughter frequently talking to herself in the presence of a shadowy figure, who has been appearing in their new home. When she tries to question her child on her behavior, she is shocked to discover that her daughter has been communicating with the dead.

programme.title: Paranormal Haunting: The Curse of the Blue Moon Inn
programme.desc: High on the peak of the Moors stands the Blue Moon Inn, the home of Matthew Hopkins for as long as anybody cares to remember. Here is the place where once every century the moon appears to turn blue and all-manner of strange and terrifying events are unleashed upon the land. The time has come again and with it a small group of interested individuals. An astronomer, an astrologer and a documentary filmmaker all arrive unaware of the pure evil that will befall them. A nightmare unfolds upon each guest until the final shocking conclusion. Prepare for witchcraft, occult rituals and answers to age-old mysteries. Prepare yourselves for the Blue Moon Inn.

programme.title: Beyond The Beaten Path Ep102: Navigating the Nile - Luxor, Egypt
programme.desc: The three Eagar brothers go Beyond The Beaten Path as they attempt to navigate Egypt’s Nile River via a Felucca Boat…the ancient trading vessel of Egyptian transport and business. They travel north along the Nile, from the oasis town of Aswan to the ancient city of Luxor.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: The Knights continue down the path to victory. Their journey must include team growth and bonding. Friendships and trust develop as the team goes through hardships such as injuries and new players. Along the way, we learn more about them, why they work so well together, whom they've lost, and how they've charged forth in spite of it all. Oh, and there's rain, lots of rain. Meet the team and hear their stories. They will excite you, move you and make you think about things you didn’t expect out of a sports documentary. Its original score, also composed and performed by the students, will have you tapping your feet as you root for the Knights.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: With the mission complete, the contestants think the season is winding down—but HQ has other plans. Their once-fabricated cover story becomes reality, pulling them into a pulse-pounding new challenge designed to test strength, coordination, and mastery of weaponry. This hybrid competition pushes every skill to the limit, weeding out all but the most well-rounded tactical athletes. Along the way, the legendary Don Mann shares his own backstory, giving rare insight into the life and mindset of the man behind the mission. When the dust settles, only one competitor will rise above the rest—earning the title of the season’s most complete warrior.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The competition reaches its ultimate test as the Face-Off enters Phase Two. Contestants are pushed to their breaking points with a brutal mix of tactical and physical challenges—running and gunning through the forest, navigating five tactical evolutions, and grinding through five grueling physical trials, capped by a punishing two-mile run over unforgiving terrain. Along the way, Don reveals the origins of his legendary SEAL Adventure Challenge, the inspiration behind this ultimate proving ground. When one contestant’s body shuts down in shock, the resilience of the warrior mindset is put on full display in a dramatic fight to recover and press on. In this season finale, only the strongest will endure, but every competitor leaves forged by fire.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This week is all about health and wellness. Kyle Reyes is back with Nuethix for an inspection into the inner workings of their company.. and his health. Then, the team gets a closer look at Dr. Price’s chiropractor practice and his unique start to the vitamin operations game. Then, get your questions about Clear Water quenched as we take a deeper dive into the company and their global legacy. To cap off the episode, two A-Team members head over to check out Stream2Sea’s innovative factory.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Today, Kevin and Toli sit down with a new batch of business owners looking to grow and thrive. This first business owner is the heart of America personified. Mark Baylis founded Valor for struggling veterans around America and now it’s time for the A-team to help him scale his mission to reach more patriots in need. From there, the team touch base with a rough and tumble businessman who brings bespoke adventure experiences to life. After that, the pioneers of STAYCA VACA bring their niche business model to the team for evaluation. Then, Compliant Tech caps off the day with a shock to the system.

programme.title: S1E3 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, and Nicholi Rogatkin, freestyle powerhouse, tackle the Downhill Challenge Medellín, the longest urban downhill race, with #HyperSmooth. Then join Gee, Rachel, and Dan Atherton, enduro and downhill champions, as they ride together through heart-pounding terrain. Speed, skill, and adrenaline collide in every unforgettable moment.

programme.title: S2E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike brings you the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch Sam Reynolds, street shredder, Clemens Kaudela, slopestyle champion, Theo Erlangsen, trail innovator, and Vincent Tupin, downhill powerhouse, in an exhilarating GoPro Course Preview in South Africa. Then head to Zion, Utah for Red Bull Rampage with Jaxson Riddle, big-air phenom, Reed Boggs, freeride master, Thomas Genon, slopestyle superstar, and Tom Van Steenbergen, trail blazing pro, as they push the limits of skill and courage on some of the planet’s most extreme terrain.

programme.title: S2E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on epic rides around the world. Watch Olympic gold medalist Conor Fields, BMX champion, compete at the highest level, then join GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, Geoff Gulevich, trail expert, and Sam Reynolds, street shredder, as they explore the stunning landscapes and dramatic terrain of Cappadocia, Turkey. Adventure, speed, and skill collide in every breathtaking moment.

programme.title: S1E1 Moto
programme.desc: Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa on the adventure of a lifetime as they explore the vibrant cities and stunning beaches of Morocco. Plus, enjoy exclusive bonus footage featuring the very best of GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S1E2 Moto
programme.desc: The journey continues as we follow two brothers on their 2,300-kilometer adventure across Morocco. Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa as they experience vibrant cities, breathtaking beaches, and the adventure of a lifetime. Plus, enjoy bonus footage of Jeremy Seewer. With 50 podiums, 11 victories, 17 race wins, and five FIM Motocross World Championship silver medals, his record is remarkable — yet his story goes far beyond the numbers.
